spec.name: The Commoner's House
spec.description: You are standing in the main living quarters of a common Roman citizen. The furnishings are sparse and it is warm here. A putrid odor is coming from the east and passages lead north and south.

north.description: A dusty road lies to the north.

east.description: What is that smell??!!! It is enough to make a yak gag!!!

south.description: You hazard a guess that a bedroom lies in that direction.

extra_descs.description: The furniture that you see is very simple and plain. It is made of rough hewn wood and fastened together with nails. It looks very uncomfortable.
